/usr/bin/ar qc libhttpserver_lib.a CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/EchoServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Epoll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/EventLoop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/InetAddress.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/TcpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/core/Timestamp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/AuthorMiddleWare.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/DownloadController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpMessage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpRequest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpResponse.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpRouter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/LoginController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/RegisterController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/StaticFileController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/TokenManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/UploadController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/http/UserManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/main_echo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/mysql/MySQLClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/httpserver_lib.dir/src/redis/RedisClient.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libhttpserver_lib.a
